title: Amazon EBS Volume
description: Schema representing an Amazon Elastic Block Store volume, which provides persistent block-level storage for use with Amazon EC2 instances.

size.description: The size of the volume, in GiBs.

availabilityZone.description: The Availability Zone for the volume.

createTime.description: The time stamp when volume creation was initiated.

encrypted.description: Indicates whether the volume is encrypted.

kmsKeyId.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AWS KMS key that was used to protect the volume encryption key.

iops.description: The number of I/O operations per second (IOPS). For gp3, io1, and io2 volumes only.

throughput.description: The throughput that the volume supports, in MiB/s. For gp3 volumes only.

snapshotId.description: The snapshot from which the volume was created, if applicable.

multiAttachEnabled.description: Indicates whether Amazon EBS Multi-Attach is enabled. For io1 and io2 volumes only.

state.description: The attachment state of the volume.

attachTime.description: The time stamp when the attachment initiated.

deleteOnTermination.description: Indicates whether the EBS volume is deleted on instance termination.

tags.description: Any tags assigned to the volume.
